one_liner: U.S.-listed Ethereum treasury vehicle: 5.42M ETH at $10.86B fair value (May 31, 2026) on 579.7M shares after ATM issuance; trades below filing ETH look-through with partial dhando floor.
key_assumptions: ETH fair value $10.856B divided by 579.7M shares = ~$18.76/sh static look-through (10-Q Q3 FY2026)
Seven-year base path: ETH +8% per year net ~10% cumulative ATM dilution adds ~$4.5/sh incremental
Staking revenue $56.9M nine months FY2026 capitalized as small operating annuity (~$0.74/sh base)
Senior-claim reserve base zero; low case stresses warrants, deferred tax, and preferred claims [HUMAN REVIEW]
open_questions: Live ETH spot versus May 31, 2026 fair value marks
